results.title: Kapp’s blistering 81 powers South Africa past India in Women's T20 World Cup
results.description: MANCHESTER, England (AP) — Marizanne Kapp's 45-ball 81 blew away India by six wickets and kept alive South African semifinal hopes in a Women's Twenty20 World Cup thriller at Old Trafford on Sunday.

results.title: Three young teenagers arrested in murder probe after boy, 17, stabbed in Battersea
results.description: Three teenagers have been arrested on suspicion of murder.

results.title: French bulldog and Boston terrier mix named Mr. Tubs up for adoption
results.description: Kingston Animal Shelter was featured on this week's Pet Parade.

results.title: India hails Sooryavanshi after record 11-ball half-century
results.description: Fifteen-year-old cricket sensation Vaibhav Sooryavanshi stunned with the fastest half-century in List A history, smashing the milestone in just 11 balls on Sunday Details

results.title: Yul Edochie shares cryptic Father's Day message after Judy Austin's ex-husband's claims
results.description: Nollywood actor Yul Edochie celebrated Father's Day with a cryptic post addressing recent wife-snatching allegations from Judy Austin's ex-husband

results.title: Riverdale police hunt suspect in shooting of pregnant woman
results.description: A pregnant woman was hospitalized Saturday after Riverdale police said she was shot during a domestic dispute at Brooks Crossing Apartments.

results.title: Mumbai Dreamers edge Hyderabad Heroes as Bengaluru Bravehearts register strong win in RPL clash
results.description: Mumbai Dreamers edged Hyderabad Heroes 12–10 to extend their unbeaten run in the Rugby Premier League Season 2, while Bengaluru Bravehearts defeated Chennai Bulls in a dominant display at Gachibowli, Hyderabad, showcasing high-intensity action in Sunday’s fixtures

results.title: Con Lamine de titular, España golea 4-0 a Arabia Saudita y se acomoda en el Mundial
Multiple buildings in Omaha’s Blackstone district evacuated after sinkhole opens along street
results.description: A sinkhole in Omaha’s Blackstone District prompted the evacuation of multiple buildings Sunday morning.

results.title: Qatar 'snubs' JD Vance on camera, hugs Shehbaz Sharif instead at US-Iran talks in Switzerland
results.description: The video shows Qatar’s chief negotiator "ignoring" JD Vance before warmly hugging Pakistani Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif.

results.title: ED probe uncovers organ trafficking racket operating as medical tourism firm in Kerala
results.description: An Enforcement Directorate probe into an alleged organ trafficking ring in Kerala has uncovered a network masquerading as a medical tourism firm. Officials revealed that financially vulnerable individuals were exploited for profit. Searches at multiple locations, including hospitals, followed the registration of a money laundering case based on Kerala Police FIRs detailing forgery and cheating.

results.title: New Café Opens; Proposed Bar Redevelopment Raises Tensions: Main Line Business News
results.description: What's opening, what's closing and what's changing on the Main Line and beyond? Here are some of the top business stories making news.
